name: Impossible Bacon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a pie plate that is 10 x 1-1/2 inches.
3. Sprinkle the cooked bacon, shredded Swiss cheese, and chopped onion in the pie plate.
4. Beat the remaining ingredients for 15 seconds in a blender on high speed.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
6. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a knife inserted comes out clean.
7. Cool for 5 minutes before serving.
